code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut i = 0
mut max_val = 0
mut min_val = 0
mut have = false
mut token = ""

while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(c)
    if c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 10 or c == 13
      if not string.is_empty(token)
        match string.parse_int(token)
        when Some(v)
          if not have
            max_val = v
            min_val = v
            have = true
          else
            if v > max_val
              max_val = v
            end
            if v < min_val
              min_val = v
            end
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        token = ""
      end
    else
      token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(c)}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if not string.is_empty(token)
  match string.parse_int(token)
  when Some(v)
    if not have
      max_val = v
      min_val = v
      have = true
    else
      if v > max_val
        max_val = v
      end
      if v < min_val
        min_val = v
      end
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end

println("max=#{max_val}")
println("min=#{min_val}")
